heading: Visible markers for rear cars
label: 20132 Visible markers for rear cars

children.text: the rear car of each passenger and commuter train has at least one highly visible marker that is lighted during darkness and when weather conditions restrict clear visibility; and
the rear car of each freight train has highly visible markers during darkness and when weather conditions restrict clear visibility.

children.heading: .—Preemption
children.label: b .—Preemption
children.text: Notwithstanding , subsection (a) of this section does not prohibit a State from continuing in force a law, regulation, or order in effect on , related to lighted markers on the rear car of a freight train except to the extent it would cause the car to be in violation of this section.section 20106 of this titleJuly 8, 1976
